features: 【No Glue, No Fuss】Skip the mess—zenotti natural self adhesive cluster lashes stick on in seconds! Bid farewell to sticky glue and time-consuming application. Our wispy self-adhesive cluster eyelashes come ready to go. Just peel off, place, and press—no clumps, and 0 frustration. Suitable for busy mornings or last minute touch-ups, these no hassle pre-glued lashes extensions make glam a breeze.

【Superior Hold: Locked - In Glamour, Rain or Shine】Crafted with innovative self adhesive lash strips, these press on lashes cluster provide a long-lasting hold that withstands rigors of daily life. Whether you’re sweating at the gym or caught in a downpour. Our wispy lash clusters will stay firmly in place. Self adhesive lash extensions ensuring a eye-catching look remains flawless from dawn to dusk and beyond.

【Gentle & Mild Formula: Comfort for Your Eye】We understand that delicate eyes deserve care. zenotti self adhesive cluster eyelash extensions are made of mild formula, making them suitable for many skin types, allowing you to flaunt your lashes with confidence. Plus, the lightweight individual lashes design feels like a cloud, you’ll barely notice the stick on lashes clusters are there.

【Endless Styling Possibilities: DIY Your Lashes Beauty】Our wispy self adhesive cluster lashes come in a versatile 5 lengths (8mm 10mm 12mm 14mm 16mm), allowing you to create a charming natural lashes extensions for any occasion. Go for a natural look with subtle no glue needed eyelashes clusters. You can even match different styles, the only limit is your imagination!

【zenotti Wants to Say】 Thank you for choosing our upgraded self adhesive lash clusters！We are devoted to providing you charming no glue needed cluster eyelash extensions for desirable quality and prioritize your comfort all the time. So, if you have any concerns about our self adhesive eyelash clusters, please let us know and we will give you a reply within 24 hours
description: “Discover zenotti's chic self adhesive lash clusters—crafted for effortless glamour, lasting comfort, and a flawless finish to elevate your eye game!" Why Choose zenotti No Glue Needed Lash Clusters？ With zenotti's self adhesive lashes cluster , you can easily achieve a flawless look in 1 minutes. Experience the ease and convenience of zenotti's self adhesive eyelash clusters for yourself! After listening to thousands of lash lovers, we learned what truly matters: our pre-glued lashes extensions should look natural, stay comfortable all day, and be easy to use. That’s why every product goes through 3 simple tests: 1.The Touch Test - Soft enough to feel like your own lashes 2.The Mirror Test - Amazing curly that matches real eyelash growth 3.The Clock Test - Stays beautiful from morning coffee to bed time Style：Wispy Self Adhesive Lash Clusters Specification：8-16mm 120pcs Eyelash Clusters Material of eyelashes：Synthetic fiber Advantages：Gentle Formula & Long-lasting Strong Hold & Not Fall Apart & Totally Vegan
